name: Indonesia Open
blurb: India's biggest week of the summer. Satwik–Chirag arrive as the form pair on tour, Lakshya headlines the singles draw, and Sindhu opens her road back.

name: US Open
blurb: A smaller Super 300 — a window for India's chasing pack to bank ranking points without the top seeds in the way.

name: Canada Open
blurb: Calgary altitude and quick shuttles — historically friendly to attacking singles players from the subcontinent.

name: Japan Open
blurb: The toughest mid-season test — every Japanese top-tenner playing at home. India's best chance to measure where the form really sits.

name: World Championships
blurb: The season's marquee. Medals here define careers — every Indian player is building their schedule around peaking in Paris.
